text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While eating in the cafeteria, I hear a<n>
conversation between three students<n>conducting
what appears to be a<n>study session.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Let us begin. I don't mean to boast,<n>but when it
comes to classical<n>literature, I am confident in my<n>
teaching abilities.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My deepest thanks! The president of<n>the
disciplinary committee can't be<n>failing her tests!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the help too. I'm not<n>great at essay
questions... They take<n>me ages.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Let us begin by reading the<n>original
text. I shall ask questions<n>based on the text
afterward. Are we<n>all ready?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ready when you are! I'll nail any<n>question you
throw at me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mmhm. I hope I get a good grade.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Ahem. I shall now start reading thepassage aloud. "The Hunting of theNue" by Minamoto no Yorimasa, fromThe Tale of the Heike...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now, Minamoto no Yorimasa<n>descended in the
fifth generation from<n>Yorimitsu, the governor of
Settsu. His<n>grandfather was Yoritsuna, governor<n>
of Mikawa...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The greatest of all his exploits... to<n>have a mount
warrior guard, and<n>among those of the Genji and
Heike,<n>the choice, so the story goes...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...My apologies. We should start on a<n>simpler
level, with the modern<n>translation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Many a year ago, a yokai known as a<n>nue would
wreak havoc on all, night<n>after night.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The reigning emperor ordered a<n>warrior named
Yorimasa to slay it. And<n>the secret strategy
Yorimasa devised<n>to slay it was—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I know! I bet he lured it with food<n>and then killed
it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Wrong.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really? Huh.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must make it clear that this is not a<n>game in
which you guess what<n>happens next. In fact, I
haven't even<n>asked any questions ye—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, oh! I know! Pick me, pick me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Go ahead. What is it that you<n>"know"?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'll bet... he never even slayed it at all!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yorimasa and the nue clash,<n>head-to-head! They
fight<n>fair-and-square, throwing themselves<n>into
it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
They continue to fight, day and night,<n>until
something blossoms between<n>them... A peculiar
kinship!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So they promise to train real hard and<n>then fight
again someday... before<n>parting ways!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And then Yorimasa spends his days<n>fighting
yokai until... One day! He's<n>surrounded by the
Four Yokai Kings!<n>It's a life-or-death situation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But then! A single shadow slices<n>through the
dark clouds! Who could it<n>be?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I believe I said... I would be the one to<n>defeat you!
That's right! It's the nue!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hooo, talk about intense! Yesterday's<n>enemy
ends up today's friend! A<n>friendship that
blossoms through<n>battle!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The Tale of the Heike is all aboutbattles with lotsa warriors, right?! I'llbet that's what happens!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...What a touching story. That's<n>amazing,
Bamboo. You've got the<n>story all figured out.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! I'm gaining some real<n>confidence
in this subject! I might<n>even aim for a perfect
score on the<n>next test!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo... While I must admit that I<n>hold your
storytelling abilities in high<n>regard...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, The Tale of theHeike is not that kind of story.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like many obstacles are going<n>to hinder
the progress of their test<n>studies...
